name: magus-website-editor
description: Build-only dependencies for the committed browser bundles: the playground's CodeMirror editor (js/editor.js -> gen/playground/editor.js) and the graph explorer's d3-force view (js/graph-explorer.js -> gen/graph/explorer.js). esbuild bundles each into a committed artifact, like gen/playground/buzz.wasm. Not part of the site's runtime dependency graph.
